name: 8" x 4" LED Flameless Black Wick Candle Cream - Threshold™: Wax, Home Decor, No Flame
description:
Whether it's a special occasion or routine day, this LED Flameless Black Wick Candle from Threshold™ will illuminate your home in elegance. This flameless candle looks like a pillar candle, with an LED bulb fitted inside. With a realistic black wick, this LED candle will add a warm and inviting touch to your decor. Pair with candles of different heights and mix it in with other decorative elements.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
